hero.name: Hassan El-Deghidy
hero.tagline: I don't build apps. I build ecosystems.

about.title: About Me
about.bio_primary: I am a university student specializing in programming with a strong focus on building real-world software systems and long-term digital products. My main goal is not just writing code, but designing and building complete ecosystems and startups that can scale into real companies.
about.bio_secondary: I prefer working on architecture, system design, and product development rather than small isolated projects.

goals.description: Continuously improve technical skills and learn new frameworks.

goals.description: Create scalable digital products with real-world impact.

goals.title: Global Reach
goals.description: Expand projects internationally, sharing innovative web solutions.

vision.title: My Vision
vision.quote: My vision is to build a modular software ecosystem company where multiple products are managed under a central intelligent system.
vision.label: This vision is currently being developed under the name

ecosystem.title: Nurovia Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: A modular software ecosystem where multiple products are managed under a central intelligent system.

products.name: Nurovia OS
products.description: The core operating system of the ecosystem. Manages all internal projects, handles system orchestration and shared services, and acts as the backbone for scalability.

products.name: Nurovia
products.description: The main company platform. Official company identity, entry point for all services, product hub and ecosystem gateway.

products.name: Xeno
products.description: A social platform (MVP stage). Features authentication, posting and interaction, with real-time communication structure in development.

products.name: Mika
products.description: Anime tracking platform. Watchlist management, episode tracking, ratings and user progress system.

products.name: MediCore
products.description: Hospital management system. Patient record management, staff & department handling, medical workflow optimization.

products.name: N-Studio
products.description: AI-powered content creation system. Automated YouTube content generation, script creation, AI-assisted production pipeline.
